question.label: Commitment closer
question.name: Given this, where do you want to change your early alignment first?
question.description: Closes on a specific behavioral commitment tied to the feedback theme.

answer: I need explicit expectations for the next cycle so I can calibrate fast.

assessment.note: Names missing explicit expectations for the next cycle as the key absence, signaling strong clarity deficit and mild growth constraint.

new_queue.label: Commitment closer
new_queue.name: What will you do differently on early alignment before we next meet?

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
